name: Samba Locks
preceding_figure_names: Criss Cross Bota Fogos (Shadow Bota Fogos), Criss Cross Voltas, Maypole, Natural Basic Movement, Reverse Basic Movement, Side Basic Movement, Three Step Turn
following_figure_names: Criss Cross Bota Fogos (Shadow Bota Fogos), Criss Cross Voltas (start from step 4 or 8), Maypole (Man turning R), Solo Spot Volta to Right (Lady to Left) (Lady turning L)
notes:
Articulate the legs and feet. Also have more isolation of upper body and hips, not one big piece. Hips move more.
Man and Lady: free arm is extended to side, just below shoulder level to match partner's arm line.

steps.action: RF forward, part weight, toe turned out, turn 1/8 to R on LF, body and RF turn more
RF forward, small step, toe turned out, no turn, body forward
LF behind RF (Cuban Cross), no turn, toe position T
RF forward, small step, in Open CPP, toe turned out, no turn, body forward
LF forward, part weight, toe turned out, turn 1/8 to L on RF, body and LF turn more
RF forward, small step, toe turned out, no turn, body forward
